attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ACCOUNTING_DATE, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ACCOUNTING_EVENT_ID, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ACCRUAL_POSTED_FLAG, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.AMOUNT, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ASSETS_ADDITION_FLAG, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ASSET_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ATTRIBUTE10, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ATTRIBUTE11, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ATTRIBUTE13, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ATTRIBUTE14, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ATTRIBUTE6, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8, replace(replace(replace(MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
chr(10),' '),chr(13),' '),chr(234),'e')
BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,
replace(replace(replace(MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.BANK_NUM,
chr(10),' '),chr(13),' '),chr(234),'e')
BANK_NUM,
MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.CASH_JE_BATCH_ID, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.CASH_POSTED_FLAG, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.CHECK_ID, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.CREATED_BY, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.CREATION_DATE, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.DISCOUNT_LOST, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.DISCOUNT_TAKEN, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.EXCHANGE_DATE, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.EXCHANGE_RATE, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.EXTERNAL_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.GAIN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.GLOBAL_NAME, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.INVOICE_BASE_AMOUNT, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.INVOICE_ID, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.INVOICE_PAYMENT_TYPE, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.LOSS_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.ORG_ID, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.PAYMENT_BASE_AMOUNT, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.PAYMENT_NUM, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.PERIOD_NAME, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.POSTED_FLAG, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.REVERSAL_FLAG, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.REVERSAL_INV_PMT_ID, MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID 
FROM
 MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL where  MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE
>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
